collection_card.move_to_workspace_disabled: No other workspace to move to
collection_card.sort_disabled: Need at least 2 tabs to sort
collection_card.dedupe_disabled: Need at least 2 tabs to dedupe

dedupe_dialog.title: Remove duplicate tabs
dedupe_dialog.description: Keeping the earliest copy of each URL.

edit_tab.title: Edit Tab
edit_tab.description: Update the title and URL of the saved tab.

move_collection.title: Move "{{name}}" to…
move_collection.description: Choose a workspace. The collection will appear at the top.
move_collection.switch_after: Switch to the target workspace after moving

create_workspace.title: New Workspace
create_workspace.description: Create a new workspace to organize your tabs

delete_workspace.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete_workspace.description: This will permanently delete this workspace and all its collections. This action cannot be undone.

create_collection.title: New Collection
create_collection.description: Create a new tab collection in this workspace.

delete_collection.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete_collection.description: This collection and all its saved tabs will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

save_tabs.title: Save as Collection
save_tabs.description: Save selected tabs as a new collection in the current workspace.

welcome.title: Welcome to OpenTab
welcome.description: Organize your browser tabs into workspaces and collections. Drag tabs from the right panel to get started.
welcome.newtab_notice: OpenTab has replaced your new tab page. Every time you open a new tab, you'll see your saved workspaces and collections.
welcome.feature_organize: Organize your browser tabs into workspaces and collections for easy access.
welcome.feature_drag: Drag tabs from the right panel into collections to save them.

empty.title: Get started
empty.description: Drag tabs from the right panel or save your open tabs as a collection.

about.title: About OpenTab
about.description: OpenTab is a tab management tool
about.feature_sidebar: The left sidebar shows all workspaces. Click + to create a new space
about.feature_drag: The right side of the workspace shows currently open tabs in the browser. You can drag them to the space area to add to favorites
about.docs_prefix: For more information, please refer to

server.title: Server Sync
server.empty_subtitle: Sync your workspaces and tabs to your other signed-in devices.
server.empty_caption: Create a workspace here, then open OpenTab on another browser a few seconds later — it will be there.
server.paused_subtitle: Paused. Flip the switch on and we'll reconnect with the saved credentials.
server.paused_hint: 💡 Your config stays on the device — turning sync off won't lose it. To wipe and start over, click [Forget this server].
server.wizard_subtitle: Setting up the server. Follow the wizard for a few steps.
server.reauth_body: Some data may not be synced. Re-authorize this device to continue using server sync. Your local data is safe.

panel.description: Sync your workspaces across devices via the OpenTab sync server.

backup.running: Saving a JSON snapshot of your workspaces to your Downloads folder...
backup.get_started: Enable sync to share your workspaces across devices. We'll back up locally first.

connect.requesting_permission: Permission required — please approve the browser prompt.
connect.host_help: Enter the OpenTab sync server URL. Defaults to {{default}}.

authorize.waiting: Waiting for you to approve in the new tab...
authorize.timeout: The authorization tab didn't respond in time.

transfer.uploading: Pushing your workspaces to the server...
transfer.downloading: Replacing local data with the server's copy...
transfer.complete_body: Your extension is now syncing with the server.
transfer.direction_help: Decide whether to upload the local workspaces to the server or replace them with the server's copy.
transfer.no_data: Neither side has data. Pick either path to finish setup — both are no-ops.
transfer.download_warning: This will replace your local workspaces with the server's copy. A backup was saved before the wizard started.
transfer.waiting_previous: Waiting for previous steps to finish.

status.title: Sync connected
status.skipped_one: 1 item not synced (chrome:// / file:// URLs are local-only).
status.skipped_other: {{count}} items not synced (chrome:// / file:// URLs are local-only).

disconnect.title: Disconnect sync?
disconnect.description: Your local workspaces stay on this device. The server still shows this device in its list until you revoke it from the Web management panel.

export.title: Export
export.description: Export all your workspaces, collections, and tabs as a JSON file.

import.title: Import
import.description: Import data from a TabTab or OpenTab JSON backup file. You'll be able to preview and select what to import before any changes are made.
import.unsupported_format: Unsupported file format. Please select a TabTab or OpenTab JSON file.
import.read_error: Failed to read file. Please ensure it is a valid JSON file.

welcome.title: Welcome to OpenTab
welcome.subtitle: Get your browser tabs in order. Spend a minute on the basics:
welcome.card_language_desc: Pick the interface language. English / 中文, switch any time.
welcome.card_import_desc: Bring in OneTab / Toby / browser bookmarks, or restore an OpenTab backup.
welcome.card_sync_desc: Connect to OpenTab Cloud to sync across devices. Optional, local-only is fine too.
welcome.hint_jump_to_main: 💡 Not sure where to start? Jump straight to the main view and create your first workspace, then come back to settings any time.

sidebar.server_tooltip_paused: Paused · flip the switch to resume

wizard.step_backup_intro: Before connecting to a server, export your local data as a JSON backup so you can roll back if anything goes wrong.
wizard.step_connect_intro: Enter your sync server URL. We'll do a quick handshake to confirm the protocol version is compatible.
wizard.step_connect_error_too_old: Server protocol too old ({{version}}). Please ask the admin to upgrade.
wizard.step_authorize_intro: Sign in and authorize this device in the new tab. We'll come back here automatically once you're done.
wizard.step_transfer_intro: Pick a direction for the first sync. After that, sync runs both ways automatically — no need to choose again.
wizard.step_transfer_warning: This is irreversible — it overwrites the other side. Step 1 already saved a local backup to your downloads folder, so you can recover if something goes wrong.
wizard.step_complete_summary: Your data will sync across all devices. You can disable or reconfigure sync any time from Settings.

import_page.no_session: No import session found. Please start import from Settings.
import_page.expired: Import session expired. Please start import from Settings.
import_page.complete: Import complete. This tab will close shortly.
import_page.title: Import Preview
import_page.select_collection: Select a collection to view details
import_page.toast_error: Import failed. No changes were made.

import_detail.identical: This collection is identical — nothing to import.
import_detail.extra_tabs: Extra existing tabs (in your data but not in import)
import_detail.create_message: A new collection "{{name}}" will be created with all imported tabs.

import_summary.summary: Will import: {{workspaces}} new workspaces, {{collections}} collections, {{tabs}} tabs

dnd.not_over_target: {{title}} is no longer over a drop target
